slice_name: Create and manage client projects with currency and billable rate

persistence.note: single frozen store; slice introduces no new persistence component

slice_entities.name: Freelancer

relationships.basis: One freelancer owns many client projects; ADR-0003 entity chain E1→E2 FK; INV2 (single freelancer per account)

slice_entities.in_scope_basis: C3 reads E1 via CT3 (sync_api C3→C2) to resolve authenticated session and scope all project data to the owning freelancer; E1 owned by reused C2

slice_entities.name: Client Project

relationships.basis: Many projects belong to one freelancer; ADR-0003 E1→E2 FK chain; INV2
One project contains many time entries; ADR-0003 E2→E3 FK chain; R7
Many projects may share a currency designation; each project carries exactly one currency; INV3
Many projects may be associated with one client; E2 references the client record to whom the invoice is addressed; R6
Each project has exactly one billable rate attached; ADR-0003 entity chain; INV4

slice_entities.in_scope_basis: C3 (introduced, fleshed_this_slice:true) owns E2 via CT2 (shared_data C3→C1 read-write); sole writer confirmed; field schema deferred to this slice

slice_entities.name: Currency

relationships.basis: One currency designation may be used by many projects; each project carries exactly one currency; INV3; R4

slice_entities.in_scope_basis: C3 (introduced, fleshed_this_slice:true) owns E5 via CT2 (shared_data C3→C1 read-write); sole writer confirmed; field schema deferred to this slice

slice_entities.name: Client

relationships.basis: One client may be associated with many projects; E2 references its client record; R6; INV8

slice_entities.in_scope_basis: C3 (introduced, fleshed_this_slice:true) owns E6 via CT2 (shared_data C3→C1 read-write); sole writer confirmed; field schema deferred to this slice

slice_entities.name: Billable Rate

relationships.basis: Each billable rate is attached to exactly one project; ADR-0003 entity chain; INV4

slice_entities.in_scope_basis: C3 (introduced, fleshed_this_slice:true) owns E7 via CT2 (shared_data C3→C1 read-write); sole writer confirmed; field schema deferred to this slice
